title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-hosted LLM runner with a simple CLI and REST API for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client and async helpers for chatting, embedding, pulling, and managing models via the local Ollama service.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers (with proxy) to interact with the Ollama API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration enabling Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding backends for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) for chatting, model management, RAG, and multi-user workspaces; runs in Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library wrapping the Ollama REST API with model POJOs, streaming, and async support.

title: ollama-cli-crystal
summary: Crystal-lang CLI and library for interacting with Ollama, offering type-safe model operations.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, and pull models from Ruby scripts and Rails apps.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal React/Next.js chatbot template that connects to local Ollama for streaming conversations.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension turning Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team: use local LLMs as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-huggingface-hub
summary: Tool to convert and push Hugging Face models into the Ollama Modelfile format for easy local serving.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that streams Ollama responses in Discord threads with slash commands and role-based access.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to invoke Ollama models inside no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger CI module for reproducibly building and testing Ollama containers and Modelfiles in CI pipelines.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-rag-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that builds a local vector index of your vault and answers questions using Ollama embeddings + LLM.
